query: My deploy succeeded but my Function App seems to be on the wrong plan. I see 'Detected function app sku: Consumption' in the GitHub Actions log instead of FlexConsumption. The az CLI command ran without errors.
context: Project already deployed once. User trying to use FC1 for a timer-triggered AI workload. CLI command used: `az functionapp create --flexconsumption-location australiaeast ...`.
expected_behavior: Claude immediately recognises this as gotcha #19 / #20 (az CLI silently falls back to Y1/Dynamic plan)
Claude explains that az functionapp create with --flexconsumption-location does NOT reliably create FC1 — it falls back to AustraliaEastLinuxDynamicPlan
Claude routes to deploying-fc1-flex-consumption-functions skill for the fix
Claude explicitly says the hosting plan cannot be migrated on an existing Function App — must delete and recreate
Claude offers to switch to either ARM REST API calls OR the Bicep template (templates/flexConsumption.bicep)
Claude warns that the FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME app setting is FORBIDDEN on FC1 — verify it is not set
Claude does NOT recommend retrying the same az functionapp create command
